observations.summary: The phrase "She left because she couldn't stand to watch you drown" echoes the motif of abandonment and emotional suffering, paralleling earlier narrative themes of isolation and internal struggle experienced by Dan and other characters.

source_evidence.quote: "She left," he said quietly. "She left because she couldn't stand to watch you drown."

observations.target_hint: This parallels Dan's internal conflict and moments of emotional isolation depicted throughout the narrative, especially his struggles with his father's grief and his own spiritual battles.
